case_title: ERDENECHULUUN BATOCHIR VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2008 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-12-2009 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO NAME CORRECT PARTIES; PLAINTIFF TO BRING INTERPRETER. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,643.96 FILED BY BATOCHIR, ERDENECHULUUN AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY CUNNINGHAM, DAVID LOREN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,643.96 FILED BY BATOCHIR, ERDENECHULUUN AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-12-2009 AT 6:30PM.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENECHULUUN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2008 - CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2008 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO BRING INTERPRETER. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MARK SCHREIBER; CLERK: M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENECHULUUN AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION RE AMENDMENT OF CLAIM TO DISMISS DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE CO. AND ADD DEFENDANT DAVID LOREN CNNINGHAM.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-01-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-14-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATOCHIR, ERDENECHULUUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, DAVID LOREN $3,255.25 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,315.25, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE TO BE $6510.49, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% LIABILITY TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR ITS PREVIOUSLY PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
